steps.title: Identify the noun phrase structure
steps.content: The blank is a noun phrase serving as the object of “leverage.” It must express a relationship between nanoparticles and properties that nanoengineers leverage to facilitate energy generation.

steps.title: Apply the plural possessive rule
steps.content:
When a plural noun ending in 's' shows possession, add an apostrophe after the final 's': “nanoparticles' properties.” This correctly indicates that multiple nanoparticles each possess properties.
  • A omits the possessive marker
  • B uses singular form
  • C doubles the possessive
.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
